title: Saudi Arabia makes history with 'Shams' satellite launch, joins NASA's Artemis Programme
summary_full: Saudi Arabia has made a historic entry into NASA's Artemis program with the successful launch of its "Shams" satellite. This marks the first Arab nation's participation in the lunar mission, contributing vital space weather research. The initiative underscores the Kingdom's growing technological prowess and commitment to global space collaboration.
